Dialog.name: MSG_SENDER_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hidetoshi Odagiri[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri of the disciplinary committee.[n]{f 1 5 0}This is a reminder that the student council meets today.[n]{f 1 5 0}The agenda today:[n]- Check-in reports[n]- Reviewing tasks[n]{f 1 5 0}That's all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri of the disciplinary committee.[n]{f 1 5 0}I recommend attending student council meetings regularly so as not to disappoint the president.[n]{f 1 5 0}That's all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri of the disciplinary committee.[n]{f 1 5 0}The student council president will be present at today's meeting. I strongly advise that you attend as well.[n]{f 1 5 0}That's all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri.[n]{f 1 5 0}The agenda today:[n]- Check-in reports[n]- Reviewing tasks[n]{f 1 5 0}I will arrive early in order to investigate that incident. I look forward to seeing you today.[n]{f 1 5 0}That's all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri.[n]{f 1 5 0}There is nothing of great importance today in regard to student council activities. Therefore, attending will be optional. Do come if you have time.[n]{f 1 5 0}I will be in the student council room dealing with that problematic issue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri.[n]{f 1 5 0}I would appreciate it if you could attend the student council meeting today.[n]{f 1 5 0}I have an important announcement to make as the representative for the disciplinary committee. As I would like to hear your opinion as well, I hope to see you there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri.[n]{f 1 5 0}I have finalized the list of suspects and submitted it. I will debrief the others at the meeting, but I simply wanted to let you know ahead of time.[n]{f 1 5 0}See you in the student council room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri.[n]{f 1 5 0}After poking around about the cigarette butt incident, I can confirm that the suspicions about you have been dropped.[n]{f 1 5 0}I have returned to the regular duties and will be waiting for you in the student council room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have a favor to ask you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri.[n]{f 1 5 0}I apologize for making such a sudden request, but know that I am only asking you because I hold you in high regard.[n]{f 1 5 0}Come find me in the student council room if you have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a student council meeting today.[n]{f 1 5 0}No need to respond to me. Just come to the student council room.[n]{f 1 5 0}That's all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri.[n]{f 1 5 0}Today's student council duties are the same as usual. Come to the student council room if you'd like to attend.[n]{f 1 5 0}That's all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Work Related[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is Odagiri.[n]{f 1 5 0}I have high hopes for you. It would be great if you could attend the meeting today.[n]{f 1 5 0}That's all.[n]{f 1 1}
